_usage: Edit these values to configure your transcription settings. Command-line arguments will override these defaults.

whisper._model_comment: Whisper model size. Use .en suffix for English-only (e.g., small.en). tiny/base for real-time, medium/large for accuracy

huggingface._model_id_comment: Hugging Face model ID. Popular options below
huggingface._use_flash_attention_comment: Enable Flash Attention 2 for faster inference (requires compatible GPU)

custom._model_path_comment: Path to custom model directory or file

audio._backend_comment: Audio capture backend: 'ffmpeg' (recommended, more reliable) or 'pyaudio' (legacy, may hang on some systems)
audio._default_microphone_comment: Audio device name. For ffmpeg: 'default', 'plughw:0,0', 'plughw:1,0', etc. Use plughw for better format compatibility.
audio._default_microphone_name_comment: Stable card name substring (e.g. 'UR22mkII', 'Steinberg') used to re-find the device after a reboot, even if its ALSA card index changes. Takes priority over default_microphone if set and matched. Auto-populated when you save a device selection in Settings.
audio._deprioritize_device_markers_comment: Optional list of lowercase substrings (e.g. 'nvidia', 'hdmi') matched against card name/description to exclude those cards from being auto-flagged as the default device. Leave empty to disable this filtering.
audio._device_index_comment: Optional numeric device index override. null = resolve device from default_microphone / default_microphone_name instead.
audio._energy_threshold_comment: Energy level for mic to detect speech. Lower = more sensitive, Higher = less sensitive
audio._phrase_timeout_comment: Seconds of silence before considering it a new phrase. Higher = fewer false phrase breaks, Lower = more responsive to pauses
audio._language_comment: Language code for transcription (auto, en, es, fr, de, etc.)
audio._same_output_threshold_comment: Number of repeated outputs before text is finalized. Lower = faster finalization (3-5), Higher = more stable but slower (10-25). Default: 7
audio._fuzzy_duplicate_threshold_comment: Similarity threshold (0.0-1.0) for detecting duplicate sentences in live transcription. Higher = stricter matching. Default: 0.85
audio._min_words_comment: Minimum word count to save a segment. 0 = save all segments, 5 = skip short fragments. Default: 0

pending_buffer._enabled_comment: Hold incomplete sentence fragments until the sentence completes, so transcript rows (and translation units) are whole sentences. false = save fragments immediately (old behavior)
pending_buffer._max_words_comment: Safety valve for run-on speech: flush a held fragment once it exceeds this many words
pending_buffer._max_age_seconds_comment: Safety valve: flush a held fragment older than this many seconds

context_prompt._enabled_comment: Feed the tail of the finalized transcript to Whisper as initial_prompt so each capture knows what came before (better continuity and punctuation)
context_prompt._max_chars_comment: How much trailing transcript to include in the prompt. Whisper's prompt budget is 224 tokens (~900 chars)

loudness_normalization._enabled_comment: Boost quiet audio before transcription (single gain per pass, never clips). Only affects the audio sent to Whisper — energy threshold and calibration always see raw levels
loudness_normalization._target_rms_dbfs_comment: Target loudness in dBFS. Audio quieter than this is boosted toward it; louder audio is left untouched
loudness_normalization._max_gain_comment: Maximum boost factor, caps amplification of very quiet audio (and its background noise)

vad._enabled_comment: Enable Voice Activity Detection to filter out music and background noise

database._path_comment: Custom database base path. Empty = use default (_AUTOMATIC_BACKUP). Can be absolute or relative path.
database._path_format_comment: Python strftime format for database subdirectories. Default: %Y/%m (2025/01)
database._filename_format_comment: Python strftime format for database filenames. MUST include time (%H%M%S) for unique databases per session. Default: %Y-%m-%d_%H%M%S (2025-01-08_143527). Use %Y-%m-%d_%H for hourly databases.
database._filename_prefix_comment: Optional prefix for session files. Empty = date only. Example: 'Church' creates '{format}_Church.db'
database._max_entries_comment: Number of recent transcriptions to send to web UI. Lower = faster, Higher = more history shown
database._srt_enabled_comment: Automatically generate SRT subtitle files alongside database
database._html_enabled_comment: Automatically generate HTML transcript files alongside database
database._record_partials_comment: Persist in-progress (partial) transcription snapshots as is_final=0 rows for offline replay/tuning. Partials are hidden from the web UI, corrections, and exports
database._partials_min_interval_ms_comment: Minimum milliseconds between partial snapshots of the same segment. Lower = finer replay fidelity, Higher = smaller databases
database._partials_retention_days_comment: Delete is_final=0 rows from session databases older than N days at server startup. 0 = keep partials forever. Final rows are never touched

web_server._host_comment: Server host. 0.0.0.0 = accessible from network, 127.0.0.1 = localhost only
web_server._port_comment: Server port. Port 80 requires admin/root privileges. Use 8080 for non-privileged access
web_server._update_interval_comment: Seconds between web UI updates. Lower = more responsive, Higher = less network traffic
web_server._settings_ip_whitelist_comment: IP addresses or CIDR ranges allowed to access settings. Empty array = allow all. Example: ['127.0.0.1', '192.168.1.0/24']

password_auth._enabled_comment: Enable password authentication as fallback for non-whitelisted IPs
password_auth._password_comment: Password for temporary access. Empty = generate random password on startup and display in console
password_auth._session_timeout_comment: How long password-authenticated sessions remain valid (in minutes)

performance._use_gpu_comment: Automatically use GPU (CUDA) if available for faster transcription

audio_backup._wav_enabled_comment: Save final session audio as .wav file (created when transcription stops)
audio_backup._ts_enabled_comment: Save continuous MPEG-TS backup (power-fail safe, created during recording)
audio_backup._base_directory_comment: Base directory for audio backups. Empty = use default (_AUTOMATIC_BACKUP). Can be absolute or relative path.
audio_backup._path_format_comment: Python strftime format for audio backup subdirectories. Default: %Y/%m (2025/01)
audio_backup._filename_format_comment: Python strftime format for audio filenames. Default: %Y-%m-%d_%H%M%S (2025-01-08_143527)
audio_backup._filename_prefix_comment: Optional custom prefix for audio files. Empty = no prefix. Example: 'Recording' creates '{format}_Recording.wav'
audio_backup._format_comment: Audio format for backups. WAV recommended to prevent file corruption

model._backend_comment: Backend for file transcription. Empty = use same as main model.

file_transcription._use_gpu_comment: Use GPU for file transcription if available
file_transcription._language_comment: Language code for transcription (auto, en, es, fr, de, etc.)

whisper_decoding._comment: Advanced Whisper decoding parameters. Only modify if you understand Whisper internals. Defaults are optimized for each use case.

live_transcription._beam_size_comment: Search breadth (1=greedy/fast, 5=thorough/slow). Default 3 balances accuracy and speed for live.
live_transcription._best_of_comment: Number of sampling runs (1=single pass, higher=more options to choose from).
live_transcription._temperature_comment: Must stay 0 for live: nonzero output varies between passes so segments never finalize and no rows save. Enforced at save and at runtime.
live_transcription._condition_comment: Use previous text as context. False for live because short chunks lack context.
live_transcription._compression_ratio_threshold_comment: Reject transcriptions with too much repetition. 2.4 is Whisper's standard; lower values (e.g. 1.8) reject legitimately repetitive speech.
live_transcription._logprob_threshold_comment: Reject transcriptions with low confidence scores. -1.0 is Whisper's standard; higher values (e.g. -0.5) silently drop quiet/accented real speech.

file_transcription._beam_size_comment: Search breadth (1=greedy/fast, 5=thorough/slow). Default 5 for file prioritizes quality.
file_transcription._temperature_comment: Temperature fallback sequence. Tries deterministic first, then increases creativity if fails.
file_transcription._condition_comment: Use previous text as context. True for file because 30s chunks have context.

file_manager._root_visible_items_comment: At the app root, only these items are shown unless 'Show hidden items' is on. Empty list = show everything. Deeper folders are unaffected. A custom database.path inside the app dir is always shown too.
file_manager._hidden_items_comment: List of specific file/folder paths to hide in file manager. Paths are relative to the working directory. Example: ['templates', 'config.json', 'models/cached']

file_mover._move_on_transcription_stop_comment: Automatically move files when transcription stops
file_mover._destination_path_comment: Destination path for files (can be SMB path like //server/share/folder or local path)
file_mover._smb_username_comment: Username for SMB/network share authentication (leave empty for local paths)
file_mover._smb_password_comment: Password for SMB/network share authentication (stored in plain text - use with caution)
file_mover._smb_domain_comment: Domain for SMB authentication (optional, can be empty)
file_mover._source_patterns_comment: File patterns to move (glob patterns relative to working directory)
file_mover._delete_source_comment: Delete source file after successful move (false = copy instead)
file_mover._preserve_structure_comment: Preserve directory structure when moving files

hallucination_filter._enabled_comment: Filter out known Whisper hallucinations (phantom subtitles from training data)
hallucination_filter._phrases_comment: List of phrases to filter. Partial matches are detected (phrase in text or text in phrase)
hallucination_filter._cjk_filter_enabled_comment: Filter out hallucinated CJK characters when transcribing Latin-based languages

profanity_filter._enabled_comment: Replace broadcast-forbidden words with **** in all transcription output
profanity_filter._replacement_comment: String substituted for each matched word
profanity_filter._words_comment: List of words to replace. Case-insensitive, word-boundary matched (so 'ass' won't match 'bass' or 'classic')

live_translation._enabled_comment: Enable real-time translation of live transcription
live_translation._translate_in_progress_comment: Also translate in-progress text (may cause flicker)
live_translation._use_gpu_comment: Use GPU for translation model. Disable to run NLLB on CPU and free VRAM for Whisper
live_translation._max_entries_to_send_comment: Number of recent translations to send to web UI. Lower = faster, Higher = more history shown
live_translation._srt_enabled_comment: Generate SRT subtitle files for translations
live_translation._html_enabled_comment: Generate HTML transcript files for translations

generation_params._num_beams_comment: Beam search width. Higher = better quality but slower.
generation_params._length_penalty_comment: Exponential penalty on sequence length. >1.0 favors longer output, <1.0 shorter.
generation_params._no_repeat_ngram_size_comment: Block repeated n-grams of this size. 0 = disabled.
generation_params._repetition_penalty_comment: Penalty applied to repeated tokens. 1.0 = disabled.

live_translation._context_window_comment: Number of segments combined for translation context. 1 = translate each segment in isolation; 2-3 = include preceding sentence(s) for pronoun/gender/tense accuracy
live_translation._debug_logging_comment: Log a per-cycle [TRANS-DBG] trace of the translation loop (which segments are cached/re-translated/persisted) to diagnose repeating-phrase issues. Hot-reloaded — no restart needed. Env var STT_TRANSLATION_DEBUG=1 also enables it.

remote._enabled_comment: Offload translation to another machine running this app
remote._endpoint_comment: URL of remote machine (e.g. http://192.168.1.200:80). Leave empty to use local translation.
remote._fallback_comment: What to do when the remote machine is unreachable: 'skip' shows the original untranslated text, 'local' falls back to local translation

live_translation._trusted_clients_comment: IPs allowed to use this machine for remote translation (managed automatically via pairing)

tts._backend_comment: TTS backend: 'edge' (Microsoft Edge cloud, 400+ voices, requires internet) or 'piper' (local/offline, download models from Model Manager)
tts._edge_voice_comment: Edge TTS voice name. Browse voices in Translation Settings page.
tts._piper_model_comment: Piper model ID (e.g. 'en_US-lessac-medium'). Download from Model Manager.
tts._speed_comment: Speech speed multiplier (0.5 = half speed, 2.0 = double speed)

corrections._confidence_threshold_comment: Minimum confidence score (0.0-1.0) to accept transcription without review
corrections._confidence_highlighting_comment: Highlight low-confidence words in the UI

n_best_alternatives._translation_count_comment: Number of alternative translations to generate

output_delay._enabled_comment: Delay output to allow corrections before publishing

custom_dictionary._file_comment: Path to custom dictionary JSON file for domain-specific terms
custom_dictionary._nllb_glossary_enabled_comment: Use dictionary for NLLB translation glossary (forced term translations)

speech_type_detection._comment: Automatic audio type detection per segment (Speaking / Music / Quiet)
speech_type_detection._enabled_comment: Tag each transcription segment with its detected audio type
speech_type_detection._music_threshold_comment: Whisper no_speech_prob above this value = non-speech audio (0.0-1.0)
speech_type_detection._quiet_db_threshold_comment: Audio level (dB) below this = Quiet; above = Music (when non-speech detected)
speech_type_detection._method_comment: Detector: 'panns' (dedicated audio tagger, accurate) or 'whisper' (legacy no_speech_prob heuristic). Falls back to 'whisper' if panns-inference / checkpoint is unavailable.
speech_type_detection._music_prob_threshold_comment: PANNs music/singing probability (0.0-1.0) above which a segment is tagged Music. Lower = more sensitive to music.
speech_type_detection._smoothing_window_comment: Number of recent detections averaged to stop the label flip-flopping (1 = no smoothing).
speech_type_detection._device_comment: Where to run the PANNs tagger: 'cpu' (default, spares GPU VRAM for Whisper) or 'cuda'.
speech_type_detection._checkpoint_path_comment: Optional path to the CNN14 checkpoint. Empty = default ~/.stt/panns_data/Cnn14_mAP=0.431.pth
speech_type_detection._transcribe_detected_music_comment: Music is always transcribed (even when VAD would drop it). When true, its rows show in the transcript. When false, they are saved hidden with denied_reason 'music' and can be restored on /corrections.

watchdog._update_channel_comment: Auto-update channel: 'main' = track the latest code on GitHub (default), 'stable' = tagged releases only.
watchdog._show_control_window_comment: macOS/Windows: open the desktop control window at login (the daemon still runs in the background). Set false to run the daemon fully headless with no window.

crash_reporting._enabled_comment: Write local crash dumps to logs/crashes/ when the app crashes.
crash_reporting._sentry_enabled_comment: Report errors, logs, traces, and profiles to Sentry (on by default). Set false for fully local crash reporting — nothing leaves the machine.
crash_reporting._sentry_dsn_comment: Custom Sentry DSN. Empty = the project's built-in default.
crash_reporting._sentry_send_pii_comment: Include request headers and client IPs in Sentry events.
crash_reporting._sentry_enable_logs_comment: Forward Python logging records to Sentry Logs.
crash_reporting._sentry_traces_sample_rate_comment: Fraction of requests traced for performance (0-1). Keep low: the web UI polls ~2x/second, so 1.0 would produce a huge transaction volume.
crash_reporting._sentry_profiling_enabled_comment: Continuous profiling (off by default): the Sentry SDK profiler thread has caused server segfaults while sampling thread stacks. Enable at your own risk.
crash_reporting._sentry_profile_session_sample_rate_comm: Fraction of profile sessions collected (0-1). Only applies when sentry_profiling_enabled is true.
crash_reporting._sentry_profile_lifecycle_comment: 'trace' = profile automatically while a sampled transaction is active; 'manual' = only when started explicitly.

analytics._endpoint_comment: Live-map ping URL, hit when a transcription starts. Change only if self-hosting the collector; leave empty to disable.
analytics._install_id_comment: Anonymous per-install UUID, generated automatically on first ping. Used only to dedupe the map so one machine doesn't spam it. No IP is stored; location is derived server-side and fuzzed.

auto_update._enabled_comment: When running the server directly (not under the watchdog), fast-forward the git checkout to its upstream branch and restart. Non-destructive: skipped if the working tree is dirty or the branch has unpushed/diverged commits, so developer work is never discarded. Ignored under the watchdog, which has its own updater.
auto_update._check_interval_hours_comment: How often the running server re-checks for updates. It also checks once at startup. Updates only apply while transcription is not running.
